I don’t know exactly what happened here because I love this app. 

I’m a premium subscription user. So I know how fast you’re on top of this. 

Just need you to know something happened and the last update is not working quite right. Please fix these issues when you can. 

Thanks.', 'author': 'Pretty Deaf Princess', 'version': '6.34.1'}, {'date': '2026-05-01', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Not free', 'content': 'you got through all these questions about goals etc and after about 5-10 minutes of answering questions they tell you you have to pay for a subscription.', 'author': 'Hfjwkalnchdkskd', 'version': '6.34.1'}, {'date': '2026-04-30', 'rating': 2, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Would be cool if it would work', 'content': 'I couldn’t even get signed in with my Gmail to use the app, there were so many run arounds and I got to a point where I was just wasting time trying to get the app to connect and work.', 'author': 'Cat Lady jr', 'version': '6.34.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-30', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Totally worth it!', 'content': 'I absolutely love this app always brings me back to the positive over and over again!', 'author': 'Horse r me', 'version': '6.34.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-30', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'AU', 'title': 'Positive affirmation', 'content': 'I enjoy using this app, I look forward to my daily affirmations and they are irrelevant to my life.', 'author': "Sis's travels", 'version': '6.34.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-28', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Installed a unremovable widget into my phone', 'content': 'This app is way too expensive for what it is. It is a standalone ongoing ghost notification from this app. I am being haunted by this stupid decision to try this app out. Now woken up overnight by this randomly and cannot remove in anyway. Yall suck', 'author': 'caspianecho224', 'version': '6.33.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-27', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Feliz con la App', 'content': 'Me encanta que me recuerde que merezco todo lo lindo que la vida tiene pensado para mi, porque siempre andamos de prisa y se nos olvida recordarlo.', 'author': 'PTomm', 'version': '6.33.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-27', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Billed as $47.99', 'content': 'I wished it would be billed ‘$3.99/month’ like it says but it’s billed at ‘once a year for $47.99.’ Why is the monthly amount even listed. So I didn’t love it and decided not to continue with the pro version, I now have a permanent alarm at 7:55am every day that can’t turn off :(', 'author': 'gadelichka', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-21', 'rating': 3, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Amazing app until they started adding pop ups.', 'content': 'I paid a year subscription for this app and have found it well worth it. It’s grounding, peaceful, and aligning. I love that you can choose your own background photo or video. I use ocean waves and it includes the sound in the background. It’s perfect. I like to scroll through once a day and “heart” my favourite affirmations.

Recently they started adding pop ups as you scroll through. When I “heart” an affirmation it brings up a pop up telling me to share with a friend, that I then have to close to continue. And it doesn’t just come up once, but continuously. This seems like a small thing, but it seriously disturbs the meditative flow. And having what is basically an in app advertisement “share our app!” pop up so consistently on a paid app, is pretty disappointing and leads me to not enjoy the app as much. 

I appreciate the work put into this app. I hope the creators can understand is this is counter to the point of the app, and find better ways to encourage us to share. 

Thank you.', 'author': 'Gene Sm', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-21', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'The reminder alarm will not stop!!!', 'content': 'Even after deleting the app!!!!', 'author': 'deryase', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-21', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Don’t set an alarm unless you want to deal with it forever', 'content': 'Can’t get rid of daily alarm. Please add other voice options.', 'author': 'HollyDawnF', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-20', 'rating': 4, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'I love it but...', 'content': 'I love this app. I only have had it for one day, but I can already tell that it’s gonna help me achieve my goal of believing in myself and loving myself. on the other hand, this app can cost lots of money just to get what people need from this app. I know that it cost money to make this app, but I don’t think that people should have to pay to make themselves feel better. other than that, this is a great app. I also don’t like the fact that when you pick a app cover, you can’t change it because it cost money too.', 'author': 'Gamecritic101345', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-20', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Alarms', 'content': 'Won’t stop giving me alarms that say start practice even after I delete the app', 'author': 'Liberty Fitz', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-20', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'I love it', 'content': 'I love what u do amazing helps me sooooo much beautiful', 'author': '\U0001fa77💚🖤❤️\U0001fa75\U0001fa76🧡💙💛', 'version': '6.32.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-19', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'True masterpiece', 'content': 'I love this app !!! I do recommend', 'author': 'Pickle girl ￼', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-15', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Medicine', 'content': 'It’s about living intentional and this is a tool for the tool box', 'author': 'philshafer', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-15', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'The app that’s tangibly changed my life for the better', 'content': 'The lock screen and home screen widgets act as ongoing visual reminders of realistic, positive, and alternative thoughts. I downloaded this app 2 years ago, and at least once a day I stop and take time to consider one of the affirmations. It has positively changed my life for the better, and that’s no overstatement. They’ve added a lot of great features over the years, including the meditative practice feature with the audio, as well as added a lot of different controls so that you can mute words that you don’t want to see and refine your topics, etc. A 5 star app, very happy annual premium customer here.', 'author': 'thewildherbalist', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-14', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Still getting daily notifications', 'content': 'UPDATE 4/13/26: after months of trying to silence these alarms after deleting the app, I found that lots of people are having success reinstalling the app, turning off notifications and then deleting it again. I just did that, and was charged 15.99. Nowhere did it say I’d be charged anything, much less 15.99. I will attempt to refute that charge, and here’s hoping that I can get these ridiculous alarms to stop. 

***

I deleted the app and am still getting daily notifications. How do I stop them? Would prefer to not have them show up every day at 12:03. Have seen other comments on Reddit about this so I know it’s an issue.', 'author': 'Rothelisa', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-14', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'What happened?', 'content': 'Why can’t we do 15 minutes affirmations anymore?', 'author': 'TWWisk Founder', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-14', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'AU', 'title': 'Alarm with no app', 'content': 'What a horrendous app. Asks a million questions before it throws the price tag at you. One of which is “do you want to set an alarm”. I deleted the app before even trying the 3 days free. But still get woken up everyday at 6.15am with a horrendous alarm that I can’t delete.', 'author': 'vikiviking', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-13', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Very helpful', 'content': 'I have never written a review before but I just want to let anyone and everyone know that this app is very helpful. It’s free and you can put it on your lock screen. It doesn’t have ads. It actually gives you meaningful words. I was in a hole for a while and decided to try this cause why not and I have seen an incline in my mental health and confidence in myself in just a few weeks. I really love this app because it feels like it actually just wants to help someone feel better about themselves not just money grabbing!!! Thank you to the creator of this!! You are the best!', 'author': 'Caco4912', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-13', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': '\U0001fa77💙💛', 'content': 'I love this app!', 'author': 'Weetzie Starr', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-13', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Love love!', 'content': 'I have been using this app for years and I absolutely love it! I also have entered my own affirmations so those hit differently too! I believe I paid for it at some point but have no idea how much it was.. worth every penny! Thanks for contributing to my growth and expansion!', 'author': 'Lisa81830', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-13', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Subscription misleading', 'content': 'I signed up for the 3 day trial to test out the app before signing up. I had selected what I thought was the monthly option - showing ‘$3.99 per month’ but ended up getting charged for the entire year. I also was never notified prior to my trial ending like others. 

I contacted Apple for a refund and since I didn’t screenshot at the time (because I didn’t anticipate any problems), I was rejected.

I barely use it because I feel like the affirmations are spoken in a hurry ☹️', 'author': 'sepideh_calif', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-12', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Angels exists', 'content': 'Never stop believing in angels. God truly sends them when those you loved were in the wind.', 'author': 'Quiann3', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-11', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Daily Affirmations', 'content': 'Really grateful for this amazing app he really helped me out in my life journey thank you and God bless', 'author': 'Cowboysforever', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-11', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Awesome', 'content': 'Really helps and the quotes are unique', 'author': 'The 1 Podcast Gal', 'version': '6.31.0'}, {'date': '2026-04-11', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Promising, but no. More than disappointed. It’s a Scam.', 'content': 'I was in a few therapy sessions that mentioned this app when I learned about it. They made it sound great, and each therapist recommended it to me, so I gave it a try. Was not impressed in the slightest, and the therapists weren’t happy when I told them about it either. 

The biggest concern I have is this: Self Advertisement out the WAZOO! The app lets you pick ONE theme for your widget in a limited selection. You don’t know it yet, but that is the ONLY ONE you get to use. You get to use only that one theme the entire time. If you try to select any other themes, including the beginning ones, they immediately slap you with a “try our free trial for THREE DAYS!” I quickly found out that no matter where you tapped elsewhere, that was an immediate pop up. 

The main part of the app, or the screen I could access, allows you to flip through affirmations to read. The thing you’re here for, and guaranteed to have in everything the app advertises. Every. Single. Swipe. Was and ADVERTISEMENT. 
“I am beautiful!” 
*swipe* Instant self promotion
“I am strong!” 
*swipe* Did you know about our app’s special features? 
“I am kind!”
*swipe* Have you favorited any of our affirmations yet? You should absolutely do that. 
“I am at peace.” 
*swipe* TRY OUR FREE TRIAL- 
Listen! App Development team. You have a great project in the making here, but if I wanted to read advertisements instead of affirmations, I would have asked for that kind of app. Hell, I would have turned on the radio or walked into New York Square. But I am not here to be constantly reminded that I’m too poor to buy simple tools for mental health. I’m here for mental health. 
As someone who is struggling, and really did like what the app promised and had wanted something like that for a while, I find this insulting that you don’t even let us experience the basic function of the app before shoving your subscription details down our throats. If we really like the app, and we have the funds, you bet your boots we’ll donate and pay for more. But we are here for something a little fancier and practical than the next “affirmations for me” Google search. Seriously. I found myself much happier there then on the first five minutes of this app. 

Also. Smaller note in this paragraph here. 
The opening “get to know you” questionnaire was cute, but I had to close and reopen the app to go back a space multiple times, and that caused me to redo the entire thing multiple times. Since the app is basing affirmations off of YOU and YOUR needs, they really need to add a back button, especially when the selection is a click and done so fast you can’t see what you pressed, and there’s a skip button in the corner. Minor disagreement, very small complaint compared to what is obviously the rest, but tolerable. 

TO THE READER: 
If you’re honestly looking for help that is affordable and ready for you, with affirmations or more, I do NOT recommend this app. The fact they claim they track your search history and other identifiers of yours on their advertisement page (4/10/2026) is concerning enough. But they’re not just tracking you. They’re making it a statement that it’s a cash grab rather than a tool. Yes, it’s an app, but it’s no longer about your mental health or their cause. 

If you want an honest opinion on where to turn next, I suggest the Finch Self Care app instead. It has affirmations, reflections, breathing exercises, soundscapes, and more that are FREE. All things this app could provide just as easily and still get the funds to keep it afloat. Yes, Finch has subscriptions you can choose to use, BUT EVERY BASE FUNCTION YOU WANT IS AVAILABLE TO YOU 24/7. The most trouble I’ve had for not having a subscription in this app was not being able to change the colors of my goals and being able to get some of the special rewards for doing a good job.
